folio.label: 74r
folio.l: And I was fourty , if I shal sey the sothe
But ©et I had alwey , a coltyssú tothe
Gat tothed I was , and that be cam wemeweme wele
I had the prente , of Seynt venus seele
As help me god , I was a lusty oon
And fair and riche , and ©onge , and wel bygon~
And trewely , as myne husbondes tolde me
¢ I had the best quoniam , that mygút be
For certes I am , al venerienö
In feelyngö , and myn hert is Marcienö
Venus me ©af my lust , my likerousnesse
And Mars ©af me , my sturdy hardynesse
Myn ascendent was Taur , and Mars æäe Inne

note.notetxt: 599There is a cross in dry point in the left margin, it takes 4-5 lines.ODR

folio.l: Allas allas , that euere loue was synne
I folwed alwey , myn inclynacione
By vertue , of myn Constellacione
That made me , I coude nat witú drawe

note.notetxt: 603There is a cross in dry point in the left margin, it takes 2-3 lines.ODR

folio.l: My chaumbre of venus , fro a good felawe
ñet haue I Mars merk , vp on my face
And also , in a nother pryue place
For god so wysely , be my sauaciou~
I louede neuäe , by no discreciou~
But euäe folwed , myn appetit´
Al were he short , long blak or whi©t
I toke no kepe , so that he liked me
How poore he was , ne eke of what degree
¢ what shulde I seye , but at the monthes ende
This ioly Clerk , Iankyn æ was so hende
Hatú wedded me , witú greet solempnytee
And to hi~ ©af I , al the lond and fee
That euäe was me ©euen , there byfore
But afterward , me repented ful sore
He nolde suffre , no thyng of my list
By god he smot me , oonys w his fist
On the cheke , for æ I rent , out of his book a leef
That of the stroke , myn ere wex al deef
Stiburne I was , as is a leonesse
And of my tonge , a veray Iangeleresse
And walke I wold , as I had don byforn~
From hous to hous , al thougú he had it sworn~
For whiche , he often tymes wold preche
And me , of olde Romayne gestes , teche
How he , simplicius Gallus , laft his wyf
And hire forsoke , for terme of al his lyf
Nougút but for openheded , he hire say
